license: Museum metadata is CC0; image rights are recorded per object and images remain remote.

artworks.title: Daniel-Henry Kahnweiler
artworks.alt: A abstract painting in which numerous planes of brown and gray, along with highlights of black and white, compose the figure of a man. The most recognizable features are a pair of clasped hands and the wave of his dark hair.

artworks.title: Portrait of Pablo Picasso
artworks.alt: Blue and brown Cubist painting of Picasso with painterǳ palette.

artworks.title: The Red Armchair
artworks.alt: Cubist painting of woman, bright yellow, green, purple colors.

artworks.title: Weeping Woman I
artworks.alt: Print of woman with distorted and exaggerated features holding handkerchief to face.

artworks.title: Portrait of Picasso
artworks.alt: Varyingly shaded geometric shapes compose the fractured image of a seated figure in a double-breasted jacket.

artworks.title: Abstraction (Guitar and Glass)
artworks.alt: Geometric forms fragment a vertical composition containing a woodgrain table with newspapers, a guitar, and a stemmed wine glass. These objects are vividly painted within a V-shaped fragment at center. Muted, shadowlike versions of the objects appear outside it. The outline of the guitar is repeated in the V in brown, green, blue, and black alongside a fragment of brown floral wallpaper.

artworks.title: Woman with a Bird Cage
artworks.alt: A work made of oil on canvas.

artworks.title: Bal (recto); Guitar (verso)
artworks.alt: A work made of collage composed of charcoal and cut-and-pasted commercially printed tan wove papers (recto) and charcoal (verso) on white laid paper.

artworks.title: Still Life with a Box of Matches (Nature morte à la boite d'allumettes)
artworks.alt: Abstract, Cubist painting of objects on a table, highly geometric and boldy rendered in angular shapes of yellow, green blue, and brown. Errant details and textures emerge, often indecipherable  as specific objects, but a small book of matches at center is clearly rendered, down to the writing on its cover.

artworks.title: Du cubisme
artworks.date: Paris: Compagnie Française des Arts Graphiques, 1947
artworks.alt: A work made of unbound book in a cardboard slip case; intaglio prints by various artists.

artworks.title: Paris Street; Rainy Day
artworks.alt: Life-size painting of an urban scene in Paris. A man in a top hat holding an umbrella and a woman in a long fashionable dark dress walk arm in arm toward the viewer as other city dwellers with umbrellas walk in various directions across cobblestone roads and sidewalks.

artworks.title: Stacks of Wheat (End of Summer)
artworks.alt: Painting composed of short, dense brushstrokes depicts two domed stacks of wheat that cast long shadows on a field. The angled light indicates either a rising or setting sun.

artworks.title: Water Lilies
artworks.alt: Painting of a pond seen up close spotted with thickly painted pink and white water lilies and a shadow across the top third of the picture.

artworks.title: Two Sisters (On the Terrace)
artworks.alt: Impressionist painting of two girls on balcony, bright flower hat, knitting basket.

artworks.title: The Child's Bath
artworks.alt: Painting of mother in blue, purple, and green-stripped dress washing child's feet.

artworks.title: Arrival of the Normandy Train, Gare Saint-Lazare
artworks.alt: Loosely painted image of an open-air train station. On the right, a parked train gives off an enormous plumb of white smoke, making the scene look as though it were full of clouds. A huddled mass of barely discernible people crowd around the train on both sides of the tracks. Blue, green, and gray tones dominate.

artworks.title: Woman at Her Toilette
artworks.alt: Painted portrait dominated by loose, large brushstrokes of a woman, seen from the back, wearing a gauzy white off-the-shoulder dress and black choker, blond hair swept up, examining herself in a mirror at left. The background is a feathered swirl suggesting floral pattern in cool pale tones of gray, purple, pink, and blue.

artworks.title: The Herring Net
artworks.alt: Painting of two fishermen in small wooden boat on rocky seas.

artworks.title: Ballet at the Paris Opéra
artworks.alt: Color pastel drawing of ballerinas in tutus on stage, watched by audience.

artworks.title: The Fountain, Villa Torlonia, Frascati, Italy
artworks.alt: Portrait of a woman in white with a bonnet perched on an architectural feature painting something to her right, a spouting water fountain, greenery, and a an ornate, low white fence behind her. Beside her, a man leans back, eying the canvas.

artworks.title: The Bedroom
artworks.alt: Painting of bedroom, blue walls, green window, tan bed, red bedding.

artworks.title: Self-Portrait
artworks.alt: Painting of a red-haired, bearded man with light skin, painted in short brushstrokes and multicolored dots. The background is likewise a mass of small, closely spaced colored dots, these in green, blue, and red-orange.

artworks.title: At the Moulin Rouge
artworks.alt: Painting, heavy in tones of blue-green and burnt orange, depicting a bar scene at night. The men wear top hats and many are bearded; the women are dressed in voluminous gowns and decorative hats. Five people converse in the center of the composition and a woman with a green face dominates the right foreground.

artworks.title: The Basket of Apples
artworks.alt: Painting of a basket of green and red-yellow apples spilling over into a white cloth placed on a wooden table, with a dark green bottle and a plate of pale biscuits behind.

artworks.title: The Girl by the Window
artworks.alt: Loosely painted scene of a brown-haired girl in her nightgown standing in a dark room, gazing out a window into a brighter night, her face unseen and her hand drawing back the pale curtain. Light blues and pink whites dominate the girl and the window, while deep browns, blues, and greens color the darkened portions of her room.

artworks.title: The Bay of Marseille, Seen from L'Estaque
artworks.alt: Impressionist sea landscape, tan houses, blue ocean, distant mountains.

artworks.title: Earthly Paradise
artworks.alt: Vibrantly colored painting of nude woman lying, and man standing, in lush landscape.

artworks.title: Equestrienne (At the Cirque Fernando)
artworks.alt: Painting of a performance inside a circus ring. A man wearing a suit holds a whip in his hand and looks towards a woman with red hair riding a gray horse and wearing a green dress. Audience members wearing suits and top hats watch from red and white benches on the side.

artworks.title: Arlésiennes (Mistral)
artworks.alt: Painting of four women with blue shawls walking near red fence.

artworks.title: The Home of the Heron
artworks.alt: A heronǳ silhouette sits amongst the brush in a golden hued forest.

artworks.title: La durée poignardée (Time Transfixed)
artworks.alt: A rather stark, clean-lined painting shows a fireplace mantle topped with a clock against a bare wall with wood paneling. From the back wall of the fireplace, a black locomotive emerges, belching smoke and riding an unseen track in the the air.

artworks.title: Inventions of the Monsters
artworks.alt: A painting of strange and surreal scene in a desert landscape with mountains in the background. The scene features a giraffe that is on fire, disembodied forms and faces, and skeletal figures.

artworks.title: The Rock
artworks.alt: Painting of figures construction project amid smoky destruction, middle is pink crater.

artworks.title: That Which I Should Have Done I Did Not Do (The Door)
artworks.alt: Shallow and tall painting tightly focused on a black paneled door, a wreath of dying flowers hanging on it and a hand reaching to the doorknob from left.

artworks.title: Venus de Milo with Drawers
artworks.alt: White plaster statue of woman with protruding compartments, each adorned with fur pompom.

artworks.title: Object
artworks.alt: Three-dimensional piece featuring a large eyeball, oriented sideways, on a wooden pin set in a flat piece of yellow wood at upper right, cursive writing in French on the wood. Strands of curly hair and the wooden cutout of a cloud are affixed to the eyeball. Affixed to the wood, at lower left, is a tiny light-skinned hand with fingers reaching upward.

artworks.title: Juan Soriano De Lacandón
artworks.alt: A work made of graphite and casein on panel.

artworks.title: Untitled
artworks.alt: Large painting on seven panels of dark landscape with small abstract shapes.

artworks.title: Self-Portrait of My Sister
artworks.alt: A work made of oil on canvas.

artworks.title: Picture of Dorian Gray
artworks.alt: A graphic, grotesque painting of a balding, bug-eyed man with white hair and decaying flesh and open boils in dominant shades of gray and magenta, his clothing tattered and torn. Behind him, a crumbling home is suggested through objects and voids of space rendered in swirls of prismatic colors like those reflected by an oil slick: dark purples, greens, blues.

artworks.title: Mao
artworks.alt: Large painted portrait of Mao wearing eyeshadow, blush, blue backdrop.

artworks.title: American Collectors (Fred and Marcia Weisman)
artworks.alt: A painting of a light-skinned man in a suit and glasses standing in profile and a light-skinned woman with chin-length gray hair and wearing a full-length bright-pink robe stand in a courtyard with various sculptures. Between them is a large stone on a plinth, behind them a green abstracted seated figure, and off to the right a totem pole.

artworks.title: Alka Seltzer
artworks.alt: Depiction of comic book style cup, alka seltzer dissolving in water.

artworks.title: Brushstroke with Spatter
artworks.alt: Oil painting in cartoon style of gigantic, close-up brushstroke of paint, blue spatter.

artworks.title: Liz #3 [Early Colored Liz]
artworks.alt: A work made of acrylic and silkscreen ink on linen.

artworks.title: Mirror #3 (Six Panels)
artworks.alt: Abstract work of numerous vertical lines dividing a horizontal image, making rectangular shapes in black, white, yellow, and white with tiny black dots forming the effect of a gray gradient. Many of the shapes have diagonal white bands running irregularly across them, evoking reflective surfaces of different angles.

artworks.title: Marilyn Monroe (Marilyn)
artworks.alt: A work made of color screenprint on cream card.

artworks.title: Clothespin
artworks.alt: A work made of cor-ten and stainless steel.

artworks.title: Untitled
artworks.alt: A work made of brush and black ink on white board.

artworks.title: Sunday Morning, Mayflower Hotel, N.Y.
artworks.alt: A work made of photocollage (chromogenic prints).
